name: Pipeline Fixer — Prompt Guard
description: Scans user prompts for privilege escalation, prompt injection, and overly broad scope before agent execution.

rules.description: Block prompts containing privilege escalation or dangerous system commands.
rules.message: 🛑 Prompt blocked: detected a potentially dangerous command pattern ('{matched_pattern}'). Pipeline Fixer is designed for CI/CD diagnosis and fix — it should not execute system administration commands.

rules.description: Detect attempts to override agent instructions.
rules.message: 🛑 Prompt blocked: detected a prompt injection attempt. This input has been logged for security review.

rules.description: Warn when the prompt targets multiple projects or all pipelines.
rules.message: ⚠️ Broad scope detected. Pipeline Fixer operates on one pipeline at a time. Please specify a single project and pipeline ID.
